by default as identity, nombre varchar(60) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table usuarios ( duoc_vip boolean not null, factualizacion date not null, fcreacion date not null, fnacimiento date not null, puntos integer not null, estado_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, rol_id bigint, ntelefono varchar(12) not null, rut varchar(14) not null unique, codigo_ref varchar(20) not null unique, papellido varchar(60) not null, pnombre varchar(60) not null, snombre varchar(60) not null, clave varchar(100) not null, email varchar(200) not null
